title: WFM1-1112: Re-architecture of assignee flow + comments + flagged corrected value
author: joel-deleon-atlas

translation.userImpact: Assignees can now view threaded comment history on flagged fields and submit corrected values directly within the census verification flow.
translation.frictionFixed: Eliminated duplicated route, service, and repository code per assignee flow.
translation.newCapability: Assignees see comment history on flagged fields and can submit corrected values. The addComment action now returns a commentId enabling downstream tracking.
watchItems: Monitor whether external users can see and add comments post-deploy
Track flagged field correction completion rate in PostHog
useEffect in CommentThreadPopover flagged by reviewer — monitor for race conditions

title: PAY-1093: refactor MFA capture phone form
author: nextinterfaces

translation.userImpact: Users who fail OTP send during MFA phone capture now see an error message and recovery path instead of a silent broken failure.
translation.frictionFixed: OTP send failures during MFA phone capture previously lacked a proper error redirect — users can now recover.
watchItems: Monitor mfa_sms_setup_phone drop-off — down 24% WoW this week
Confirm country dropdown sort order doesn't cause confusion for frequently used countries

translation.userImpact: Validation fields are now automatically routed to the correct assignee on census verification round creation — WSEs see only their fields, client admins see only theirs.
translation.frictionFixed: Assignee-filtered view was broken because assigneeUserId was never populated on creation, meaning neither WSEs nor client admins could see correctly segmented fields.
translation.newCapability: Automatic per-field assignee routing during census verification session creation.
watchItems: Casing inconsistency ('Employee' vs 'employee') may cause fields to silently route to wrong assignee — monitor WSE reports of missing fields
Watch for census sessions where assigneeUserId remains null after round creation

title: WFM2-666: Contribution splits add contribution split entry modal
author: fabianm-atlas

translation.userImpact: Admins can now configure country-specific contribution splits via a new modal form — setting benefit type, split percentages, and employer/employee contributions per country.
translation.newCapability: New modal to add contribution split entries per country, with benefit type selection, split validation, and a discard dialog. Shipped with no PostHog instrumentation.
watchItems: No PostHog events added — contribution_split_added should be tracked
Monitor for form validation errors on split percentage totals

title: PAY-1405: add events flags to sso posthog monitoring
author: linh-atlas

translation.userImpact: SSO setup and configuration actions are now tracked in PostHog, giving the product team full funnel visibility into the SSO onboarding flow.
translation.newCapability: 8 new SSO events now tracked: setup initiation, metadata upload, manual entry, test connection success/failure, and enable/disable toggles.
watchItems: Validate all 8 SSO events are firing in PostHog
Monitor SSO_SETUP_STARTED vs SSO_ENABLED conversion rate
sso_login_failed up 23% WoW — determine if this is new visibility or genuine regression

title: WFM1-1137: Finish implementing HRSD for Census Verification
author: TristanBarrow

translation.userImpact: HRSD reviewers can now flag any census verification field with a comment and due date, and all employee data sections are automatically included in every verification round.
translation.frictionFixed: Field lists were manually curated and incomplete; reviewers had no way to flag discrepancies with a tracked note and deadline.
translation.newCapability: Flag fields with comment + due date, bulk-approve non-flagged fields, select-all that auto-excludes flagged fields.
watchItems: Monitor flag submission success/failure — multi-step DB transaction, partial failure could leave fields inconsistent
Bulk approve: verify flagged fields are never accidentally approved under concurrent actions

title: FNM1-805: BE - Update the GetTakeHomePay API for empty response & save Last sync attempted timestamp
author: jasminek-atlas

translation.userImpact: Users querying Take Home Pay with no payroll data now receive a clear error message and can see when the last sync was attempted instead of getting an empty response.
translation.frictionFixed: Users received no meaningful feedback when Take Home Pay data was unavailable — now get explicit error + last sync timestamp.
translation.newCapability: GetTakeHomePay API returns a 'Last sync attempted at' timestamp alongside not-found errors.
watchItems: Monitor API response rates for TakeHomePayNotFoundResponse — high rates indicate upstream sync failures
Watch for null LastSyncAttemptedAt if TakeHomePaySyncLogs table is empty

translation.userImpact: Employees can now request virtual expense cards through Atlas HXM. Admins can approve, reject, freeze, unfreeze, or terminate cards with real-time provisioning via Ramp.
translation.newCapability: End-to-end virtual expense card lifecycle: request → admin approval → Ramp provisioning → freeze/unfreeze/terminate. Wallet balance management and transaction history for admins.
watchItems: Stripe Issuing referenced in DEMO.md but Ramp used in env — confirm which provider is live
Dual webhook handlers (Stripe + Ramp) suggest incomplete migration — monitor for misrouted webhook events
Card provisioning via background worker — monitor queue lag and provisioning failure rates

translation.userImpact: Bug fix in Partner Connect frontend. Specific user impact requires diff review.

title: FNM2-788: Change GTN import button label

translation.userImpact: The GTN import button now has a clearer label, reducing confusion about what the action triggers.

title: FNM2-778: Added new button for GTN Mapping and Import Recon File

translation.userImpact: Users can now trigger GTN mapping and import a reconciliation file from the same view without navigating away.
translation.newCapability: New GTN Mapping and Import Recon File buttons on Partner Connect dashboard.
watchItems: No PostHog events for GTN mapping actions — add gtn_mapping_triggered and recon_file_imported
